issues.description: Condition uses HasCardOnBoard to check for 'Sugar' by name, but the effect text specifies 'If your Leader is [Sugar]'. This should use LeaderIsName condition instead, as it's checking the Leader specifically, not any card on board.
The PlayFromHand action is missing the 'rested' specification. The effect text explicitly states the character should be played 'rested', but there's no 'rested: true' field in the action.
The PlayFromHand action is missing 'count: 1' to match 'up to 1' in the effect text, though this may be implicit.
